title: Heaven Sends Large Star Shaped Garden Stake
features: A beautiful star shaped garden stake by Heaven Sends.
description: You can bring a rustic feel to your outdoor space with this beautifully made, large star-shaped garden stake from Heaven Sends. This large star shaped stake is made from durable metal with a minimalist wireframe design. If you are looking to enhance your garden during the festive season or bring a sense of country-style design to your garden, this garden stake is the perfect addition! The star design of this garden stake makes it ideal for Christmas time, but its simplistic elegance means you can use it all year round. Add interest to your garden borders, or create a focal point in your patio pots with this gorgeous metal star garden stake.
